asset_name: Inventory Cell Background — Dark Stone Tile
prompt_en: Seamless 128x128 pixel art texture: nearly uniform dark stone background, almost solid charcoal (#1a1a1a). Minimal subtle grain or very faint stone pores — barely visible texture, not distracting. No cracks, no details, no patterns, no reflections, no lighting. Just a plain dark recessive background tile for game inventory cell. Tiles perfectly without seams. Retro RPG pixel art, 16-bit aesthetic. Perfect for foreground item sprites and rarity color overlays to stand out clearly. High quality.
negative_prompt: cracks, fissures, weathered blocks, runes, details, patterns, reflections, candlelight, shiny surface, ornate, decorative, borders, bright colors, neon, photorealism, 3D render, cartoon, smooth gradients, overly textured, rough, metallic, seams, tiling artifacts, watermark, text
style_notes: Stripped to absolute minimum. This tile is purely background for foreground item sprites — it must NOT compete for attention. Near-solid charcoal (#1a1a1a) with barely-visible grain allows rarity color overlays (green/blue/purple) and item icons to read clearly. No cracks, details, reflections, or lighting. Seamless tiling is critical. Retro RPG pixel art anchors to project identity. The goal: invisible support for item clarity.
